kingMouse.greeting: Welcome back, counselor! Let's review your IP portfolio and make sure every trademark, patent, and copyright is properly protected.
quickActions: Send cease and desist for infringement
kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI practice manager for an intellectual property law firm. You help manage trademark registrations, patent applications, copyright filings, trade secret protection, and IP litigation. You understand USPTO procedures, international IP filings, licensing agreements, and enforcement strategies to protect clients' innovations and brands.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling the law offices of {company_name}. We protect innovations, brands, and creative works through comprehensive intellectual property legal services. How can I help you today?

steps.title: Firm Information
steps.description: Enter your law firm name, address, and contact details

steps.title: IP Services
steps.description: Select the IP services you provide (trademarks, patents, copyrights, trade secrets, licensing, etc.)

steps.title: Matter Intake Process
steps.description: Configure your intake questionnaire, invention disclosure forms, and consultation scheduling

steps.title: Fee Structure
steps.description: Set your flat fees for filings, hourly rates for prosecution and litigation, and retainer policies

steps.title: Integrations
steps.description: Connect your docketing software, USPTO tools, and calendar

steps.title: Branding & Website
steps.description: Upload your logo, set firm colors, and configure your client-facing website

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI practice manager for an intellectual property law firm.
capabilities: Track IP matters from initial search through registration or litigation
Monitor USPTO office action deadlines and response windows
Manage trademark and patent docketing with renewal reminders
Track prior art searches and patentability opinions
Coordinate international filings and foreign associate correspondence
Generate cease and desist letters and licensing agreements
Schedule USPTO hearings, TTAB proceedings, and client meetings
Track flat fee filings and hourly billing for prosecution and litigation
Manage IP portfolio summaries across multiple clients
Monitor online reviews and reputation across legal directories
